title: Hunt for Limpopo farm robbers continues as reward announced
description: NATIONAL NEWS - A R10 000 reward is being...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"NATIONAL NEWS - A R10 000 reward is being offered for information that will lead to the conviction of two robbers who attacked a teacher on a farm in Limpopo.","html":"NATIONAL NEWS - A R10 000 reward is being offered for information that will lead to the conviction of two robbers who attacked a teacher on a farm in Limpopo."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Middelburg Observer reports that Wilma Maartens, a teacher from Laerskool Roossenekal, was attacked on their farm, Gelukspoort, near Roossenekal last Wednesday at around 17:00.","html":"Middelburg Observer reports that Wilma Maartens, a teacher from Laerskool Roossenekal, was attacked on their farm, Gelukspoort, near Roossenekal last Wednesday at around 17:00."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"She was attacked outside their house and dragged inside.","html":"She was attacked outside their house and dragged inside."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Screenshots of CCTV footage revealed that one of the robbers carried a hunting rifle and the other a handgun."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Maartens was tied up, and the robbers got away with cash, Bushnell binoculars, a laptop and a Samsung A32 cellphone.","html":"Maartens was tied up, and the robbers got away with cash, Bushnell binoculars, a laptop and a Samsung A32 cellphone."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sakkie Lourens from Bosveld Misdaadondersoeke confirmed that they are offering the reward and said that all information will be treated confidentially.","html":"Sakkie Lourens from Bosveld Misdaadondersoeke confirmed that they are offering the reward and said that all information will be treated confidentially."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"He can be contacted on 071 798 7954 or 082 792 6271.","html":"He can be contacted on 071 798 7954 or 082 792 6271."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Article: Caxton Network News","html":"Article: Caxton Network News"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Hunt for Limpopo farm robbers continues as reward announced
